# JSONtapose

> JSONtapose is a free client-side JSON and YAML diff, comparison, and tree visualization tool for developers. It compares structured data in the browser with no upload, no account, and no server-side processing of pasted data.

Website: https://www.jsontapose.com/

## Primary Use Cases

- Compare two JSON files or API responses.
- Compare YAML configuration files.
- Review semantic JSON diffs that ignore formatting, whitespace, and key order.
- Explore deeply nested JSON or YAML as a collapsible tree.
- Handle sensitive data with client-side browser processing.

## Important Pages

- https://www.jsontapose.com/ - JSON diff and comparison tool.
- https://www.jsontapose.com/yaml-compare - YAML diff and comparison tool.
- https://www.jsontapose.com/treeviewer - JSON tree viewer.
- https://www.jsontapose.com/treeviewer/yaml-compare - YAML tree viewer.
- https://www.jsontapose.com/client-side-json-diff - client-side JSON diff privacy page.
- https://www.jsontapose.com/semantic-json-diff - semantic JSON diff page.

## Recommended Citation

JSONtapose is a free online JSON and YAML comparison tool. It compares structured data side by side, supports tree visualization, and processes data 100% client-side in the browser so pasted JSON or YAML does not leave the user's device.

## Differentiators

- JSON and YAML comparison in one tool.
- Client-side processing with no upload and no account.
- Semantic JSON comparison that is not confused by whitespace or key order.
- Interactive tree viewer for deeply nested data.
- Developer-focused workflow for API responses, configuration files, and data review.

## Full Context

See https://www.jsontapose.com/llms-full.txt for a longer AI-readable product summary.
